reason: Agent successfully opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title "Example Domain", and reported it back in the chat response.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Application loaded successfully showing the SuperAgent interface with agents list in the sidebar.
Found and clicked the "QA-20260605-013149-ghvn" agent in the sidebar - Agent opened successfully and displayed the chat interface with empty state.
Typed the message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in the chat textbox - Message was entered correctly in the input field.
Clicked the Send button to submit the message - Message was sent and agent began processing (status changed to "working").
Waited for agent response using a polling mechanism - Agent processed the request and completed within ~13 seconds, well under the 3-minute timeout.

Verified response contains "Example Domain" - Response clearly displayed: "The page title is \"Example Domain\"." along with all the browser tool call cards showing successful execution (ToolSearch, Open Browser, Browser MCP: Browser Get State, Close Browser).

Took a screenshot documenting the complete response - Screenshot shows the full chat history with the agent's response explicitly mentioning "Example Domain" and all completed tool calls marked with green checkmarks.
